item.title: SHEMM Coach
item.description: Today, let's talk Medication. There's a check scheduled today for whether anything needs adding — that's not optional, and it's not something to guess on. Catching a gap early is easy; catching it three days late is not. Everything else on the calendar — meals, rest, movement — depends on this piece being handled first. Action: do the meds check at the scheduled time, don't push it back.
